request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our allies too. Did you know that last year's supply chain disruptions cost European defense industries over $12 billion? That's money that could've gone to modernizing NATO's deterrence capabilities. When we rely on foreign tech, we're not just risking our own security - we're putting our partners at risk. Time to bring critical production home and secure our collective future. #StrongerTogether #DefendEurope
